violations.text: The hot box (warmer) was not in good repair. Per PIC, the warmer does not reach temperature to keep foods held at a minimum of 135 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
A soap dispenser was observed at the prep sink. Removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Dish washing machine was not functioning at the time of inspection. Technician was on site during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
